titleStmt.title: SII 37.531: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 531. (A.R. No. B 33 of 1943-44.) Dudyāla, Nandikotkur Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab set up on a platform under a tree near the Śiva temple.
This is dated Śaka 1489, Prabhava, Chaitra ba. 30, Wednesday, Solar Eclipse, corresponding to 1567 A.D., April 9.

It records a gift of land as dasavanda mānya by Rājādhirāja Vasantarāya, son of Yaṇṭagiri Vasantarāya to Veṅgaḷa-Reḍḍi, son of Timmā Reḍḍi for his having cleared the forest and repaired the tank at Dudyāla in the Siddhāpura-sīma given by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Timmarājayyadēva-Mahārāja as nāyaṅkara to the donor with the stipulation that repairs to the tank should be effected over year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka varuṣaṁbulu
1489 Agunēṭi prabhava saṁvatsara caitra ba 30 bu śrīmadrā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāsivadēvama
hārāyaluṁgāru vidyānagaramaṁddu vajra siṁhvāsanā
pṛthivi sāṁmrājyamu śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrīmaṁ
jādhirāja yāṁṭagiri vasaṁtarāyani komāruṁḍu
vasaṁttarāyaniṁgāru dudyāla ceruvuku yiccina
tiṁmmāreḍi komāruṁḍu veṁgaḷureḍiki yicina dasavaṁ
da . silāśāsanakramameṭlaṁnanu . śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
na tiṁmmarājayyadēvamahārājuluṁgāru māku nā
ku pāliṁcci yiccina śivāpuraṁ sīmalōni dudyāla grāma
ṭṭa Aḍava Ayivuṁḍaṁgānu nīvu yī saṁvatsarāna
ruvayi varahāla panisēyiṁcina nimityamuṁnu tara
tanu ceruvumīdanu Ayi varahāla pani sēyiṁ
nnu nīku dasavaṁddapu māṁnyamuṁgānu yiccina gāḍi
maḍi maruturuṁnnu paruvatayya cēta koṁ
muṁnnu yī tathātithi sūryagrahaṇa puṁṇyakālama
sa vaṁdapu mānyamuṁgānu yistimi trivācakaṁgā
śudhigānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigānu yistimiṁgāna
pautrapāraṁparyamugānu ceruvuku yāṁṭānu Ayidu
hāla panisēyiṁcci Ā mānyamu Anubhaviṁcci bradikēdi .
dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahā
ṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . yī dha¨rmmānaku yavvaru tappinaḍa
vāraṇāśilōnu tamatallitaṁḍrādula caṁpina

vōjulaku yī sūryagrahaṇa puṇya
kālamaṁdu dhāravōśi yiccina maḍiki
maḍi Aṁcu pātri
Agusāla śidōjuku kumara vāri maḍi
tū¨rpumaḍi pātika yistimi I dha¨rmānaku ya
vvaru tappinānu gāḍida sisnaṁ kallu vuppu ti
nnavāru .
Digital edition of SII 37.531 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
